title: Fiery Tunisian Cabbage Tagine
description: A spicy and comforting Tunisian dish featuring white cabbage, broiled to perfection on a salt block, making it a keto-friendly option.
instructions: Preheat the broiler and heat the salt block in the oven at 400 degrees for 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded cabbage, olive oil, harissa, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper until the cabbage is well coated.
Remove the salt block from the oven and place it under the broiler, then carefully add the cabbage mixture on top of the block.
Broil the cabbage for 10 minutes, or until it starts to brown and crisp up.
Remove the cabbage from the oven and add the chicken broth and lemon juice, stirring to combine.
Return the cabbage to the oven and broil for an additional 5 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the cabbage is tender.
Remove the cabbage from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the cabbage hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
